title: Crime Scene
entries: The case of the {table:gm/adventure/crime} {table:gm/adventure/crime-location}. The main piece of evidence held by the town guard is {table:gm/adventure/crime-clue} — the perpetrator is in fact {table:gm/adventure/crime-perpetrator}. The prevailing theory is that {table:gm/adventure/crime-interested} may be involved, and the suspected motive is {table:gm/adventure/crime-motive}. However, another group is {table:gm/adventure/crime-outsider} for this. It happened {table:gm/adventure/crime-time-since} ago; it is currently {table:gm/adventure/crime-time-of-day}, and the weather since the crime has been {table:gm/adventure/crime-weather}.
